Description: Interface between the Protocol Layer and the Die-to-Die Adapter.
Name: FDI (Flit-aware Die-to-Die interface)

Description: Interface between the Die-to-Die Adapter and the Physical Layer.
Name: RDI (raw Die-to-Die interface)

Description: Identifier carried along with the Flit header for de-multiplexing of Flits on the Receiver.
Name: stack identifier

Description: Parameter negotiated to support multiplexing two protocol stacks on the same physical Link.
Name: Multi_Protocol_Enable

Description: Parameter negotiated to support dynamic multiplexing between two stacks of the same or different protocols.
Name: Enhanced Multi_Protocol_Enable
